title: Navaris Decorative Fluted Transparent Glass Bowl for Fruit Snacks Sweets - 26cm Diameter Table Centerpiece Dish
features: DECORATIVE DISH: Present fruit in style with this beautiful glass bowl by Navaris. With its transparent glass, this clear glass dish can make an elegant centerpiece on a kitchen, dining or coffee table.

PERFECT PRESENTATION: As well as fruit, this bowl is a great way to display sweets, desserts, or a selection of snacks. The bowl's stylish design adds a sophisticated accent to the table and creates a beautiful backdrop for its contents.
SPECS: This elegant fruit dish measures 26cm in diameter and 11cm high (10.2 inches in diameter and 4.3 inches high). The stylish bowl is made of solid glass.
GIFT IDEA: A decorative glass dish makes a wonderful gift for family and loved ones. Give someone special the perfect Christmas, birthday or housewarming present.
CARE AND CLEANING: Wash before first use. Not suitable for dishwasher, microwave, or oven. Gently hand wash only. Avoid sudden temperature changes during all use. Keep away from fire.
description: Display fruit in style with a decorative glass dish by Navaris. This transparent glass fruit bowl features a tasteful hue and fluted finish to beautifully set off any items that you're presenting. BEAUTIFUL BOWL The clear glass dish creates the perfect backdrop for your selections of fruit, snacks or other small items. Even when not in use, the bowl adds a touch of elegance to any space in your home. GREAT GIFT This stylishly shaped glass bowl can make a perfect present for friends, family or loved ones. A decorative dish is a great gift for any occasion, including for Christmas, an anniversary, a housewarming party or a birthday. CLASSY GLASS The decorative dish is made of solid glass, for a product that is both practical and stylish. Real glass is simply more elegant compared to plastic alternatives. SPECIFICATIONS Size: 26cm x 26cm x 11cm (10.2" x 10.2" x 4.3") Material: Glass SCOPE OF DELIVERY 1x Fruit bowl
